records.ety: [OE. hotte; akin to D. hut, G. hütte, OHG. hutta, Dan. hytte, Sw. hydda; and F. hutte, of G. origin; all akin to E. hide to conceal. See Hude to conceal.]

defs: A small house, hovel, or cabin; a mean lodge or dwelling; a slightly built or temporary structure.
quotes: Death comes on with equal footsteps To the hall and hut
